query: SELECT section, COUNT(*) as totale, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cloudfront_privati FROM news_items GROUP BY section ORDER BY cloudfront_privati DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT section, COUNT(*) as totale, SUM(CASE WHEN imageUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cloudfront_privati FROM news_items GROUP BY section ORDER BY cloudfront_privati DESC LIMIT 20;
